race.description: Pinjarra Cup Day - Fashions On The Field Mdn
race.comment: WYNN LAS VEGAS (5) stormed home from the back on resumption when jumping the race favourite, beaten 1.2L. Getting out in trip is a big tick and the blinkers go on now. May get back in the run but he looks to have plenty of ability and he can land the knockout blow this time. MIDNIGHT STAR (11) got a long way back as an odds-on chance, flying home to miss by 1.9L at Geraldton. Tougher here, but the Blinkers go on for the first time and getting out in trip now looks perfect. Wouldn't surprise to see her storm home over the top. RARE HONOR (2) missed by 0.3L over the 1800m trip at this track last time out. Back to the mile here, but he maps well and he rates highly on his latest effort. Can feature. HOPE TO ADMIRE (3) can sit closer than he did last time out and can make his presence felt. FLYING MARADONA (8) can improve with the debut performance under his belt.
